subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is Thy servant who supplicates before Thy Kingdom, is enrobed in Thy love, and prostrates his brow in the dust at Thy threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبدک المتضرع الی ملکوتک المتدرع بحبک المتمرغ الجبین بتراب عتبة
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @wisdom [hikmat]
